## Notable Characteristics

- **Power data** - only fixture with running power (Stryd/watch-based)
- **Short run** - 15 minutes, likely a tempo or test effort
- **Uneven final lap** - 623m vs 1000m auto-lap splits
- **Progressive effort** - HR and power increase across laps (negative split)
- **Large file size** (84 KB) relative to duration - contains dense record data

## Test Value

Good for testing: cardio activity with power data, lap-based import with uneven splits, running power metrics display, and large file parsing performance.
